hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'PRESENTATION.*\.md'; then python ground-up-experiments/generate_notebook.py 2>/dev/null || true; fi

allow: Bash(python -c "import genetic_dp.models.reward as r; import inspect; print\(inspect.getfile\(r\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from genetic_dp.models.belief import InferenceResult; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(InferenceResult\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from genetic_dp.exact_dp.utils import lift_tuple_posteriors_to_genes; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(lift_tuple_posteriors_to_genes\)\)")
Bash(pandoc PRESENTATION_FULL.md -o PRESENTATION_FULL.pdf --pdf-engine=xelatex --toc -V geometry:margin=1in -V fontsize=11pt -V 'mainfont=DejaVu Serif' -V 'monofont=DejaVu Sans Mono')
